title: Avfuel Expands Growing SAF Supply Chain With New Strategic Supply Point in Colorado
content: Avfuel Corporation has announced that a new terminal in Denver will supply its sustainable aviation fuel (SAF). The location is the first to serve SAF in the region. Avfuel states that the terminal will play a crucial role in expanding SAF accessibility across the U.S. Currently, Avfuel has eight supply points throughout California, Texas, New Jersey, Florida and now Colorado.
author: Analysts Account
